description: Tim Bestwick was appointed UKAEA’s Interim Chief Executive Officer in July 2025. Career highlights include: Chief Development Officer and Deputy CEO, UKAEA Chief Technology Officer and Director of Strategy, Communications & Business Development, UKAEA Executive Director, Business & Innovation at the Science & Technology Facilities Council. Non-Executive Director of the Harwell Science & Innovation Campus. Chair of the Eureka Network (the world’s largest international business to business innovation network). Non-Executive Director of ten start-up technology companies. ‘Innovation Sector Champion’ Award from AIRTO - the membership body for organisations operating in the UK’s innovation, research and technology sector. Chair of The Space Partnership Board

details.body:
Tim Bestwick was appointed UKAEA’s Interim Chief Executive Officer in July 2025.

Career highlights include:

  • Chief Development Officer and Deputy CEO, UKAEA
  • Chief Technology Officer and Director of Strategy, Communications & Business Development, UKAEA
  • Executive Director, Business & Innovation at the Science & Technology Facilities Council.
  • Non-Executive Director of the Harwell Science & Innovation Campus.
  • Chair of the Eureka Network (the world’s largest international business to business innovation network).
  • Non-Executive Director of ten start-up technology companies.
  • ‘Innovation Sector Champion’ Award from AIRTO - the membership body for organisations operating in the UK’s innovation, research and technology sector.
  • Chair of The Space Partnership Board

Tim Bestwick was appointed UKAEA’s Interim Chief Executive Officer in July 2025.

Career highlights include:

  • Chief Development Officer and Deputy CEO, UKAEA
  • Chief Technology Officer and Director of Strategy, Communications & Business Development, UKAEA
  • Executive Director, Business & Innovation at the Science & Technology Facilities Council.
  • Non-Executive Director of the Harwell Science & Innovation Campus.
  • Chair of the Eureka Network (the world’s largest international business to business innovation network).
  • Non-Executive Director of ten start-up technology companies.
  • ‘Innovation Sector Champion’ Award from AIRTO - the membership body for organisations operating in the UK’s innovation, research and technology sector.
  • Chair of The Space Partnership Board

Duties include:

  • Accounting Officer and responsible spend of public funds
  • day-to-day leadership of the UK Atomic Energy Authority
  • Head of the UK Atomic Energy Authority fusion laboratory

role.title: Interim UKAEA Group Chief Executive Officer

role_appointments.title: Tim Bestwick - UKAEA Group Chief Executive Officer (Interim)

details.body:
Tim Bestwick was appointed UKAEA’s Interim Chief Executive Officer in July 2025.

Career highlights include:

  • Chief Development Officer and Deputy CEO, UKAEA
  • Chief Technology Officer and Director of Strategy, Communications & Business Development, UKAEA
  • Executive Director, Business & Innovation at the Science & Technology Facilities Council.
  • Non-Executive Director of the Harwell Science & Innovation Campus.
  • Chair of the Eureka Network (the world’s largest international business to business innovation network).
  • Non-Executive Director of ten start-up technology companies.
  • ‘Innovation Sector Champion’ Award from AIRTO - the membership body for organisations operating in the UK’s innovation, research and technology sector.
  • Chair of The Space Partnership Board

Responsibilities include:

  • Development of the science campuses at Harwell and Culham
  • Leading on UKAEA’s work with private sector fusion companies
  • Intellectual property
  • Commercialisation of UKAEA technology

Tim Bestwick was appointed UKAEA’s Interim Chief Executive Officer in July 2025.

Career highlights include:

  • Chief Development Officer and Deputy CEO, UKAEA
  • Chief Technology Officer and Director of Strategy, Communications & Business Development, UKAEA
  • Executive Director, Business & Innovation at the Science & Technology Facilities Council.
  • Non-Executive Director of the Harwell Science & Innovation Campus.
  • Chair of the Eureka Network (the world’s largest international business to business innovation network).
  • Non-Executive Director of ten start-up technology companies.
  • ‘Innovation Sector Champion’ Award from AIRTO - the membership body for organisations operating in the UK’s innovation, research and technology sector.
  • Chair of The Space Partnership Board

Responsibilities include:

  • Ensuring the highest standards of financial management and corporate services within the UK Atomic Energy Authority
  • Growing and developing UKAEA’s national innovation campuses (Culham, Harwell and Rotherham)
  • Authority Secretary
  • Senior Information Risk Officer

role.title: Chief Financial Officer, Director of Property and Corporate Services

role_appointments.title: Tim Bestwick - Interim Chief Financial Officer, Director of Property and Corporate Services

title: Dr Tim Bestwick OBE
